source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local principle grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and supported by seg.1.1.1.4|seg.1.1.1.5|seg.1.1.1.6
distilled_thesis: Within the bounded route, overflow is not only emitted but genuinely received, so reciprocity belongs to abundance before abundance becomes a further gift.
